description: A junior paralegal accidentally deleted several important emails related to 'Acme'. You must recover them immediately for a legal hold. Recover exactly 4 emails containing 'Acme' in the subject line from the Trash and move them to a new folder named 'Legal_Hold' under 'Local Folders'. Ensure these 4 recovered emails are marked as Starred and Unread within the 'Legal_Hold' folder.
